fixture: semicolon_strings_comments

statement 1:
  sql:
    -- top-level comment with semicolon;
    CREATE TABLE notes (id INTEGER NOT NULL, body VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO notes VALUES (1, 'semi;colon')
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    /* block comment; kept outside statement */
    SELECT id FROM notes
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1
